visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene begins inside a brightly lit Costco warehouse. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black vest over a white long-sleeve shirt, stands in front of a refrigerated display case. She holds a large, clear plastic container containing a Stir-Fried Radish Cake kit. She shows the package closely to the camera, pointing at the ingredients including sliced radish cakes, eggs, and vegetables. Behind her, other shoppers and warehouse shelves filled with goods are visible in a shallow depth of field. (2) The visual transitions to a domestic kitchen setting with bright indoor lighting. A sequence of close-up shots shows a hand using tongs to place the white, rectangular radish cake slices into a black frying pan with shimmering oil. The camera captures the browning of the cakes. Then, chopped green leeks, bean sprouts, and scrambled eggs are added to the pan. A dark brown savory sauce is poured from a small plastic cup over the ingredients as they are tossed in the wok. (3) The final phase takes place in a home living room area. Two women are seated at a gray marble-textured table. One woman is in a purple top, and the other wears a white t-shirt and a black beret. They use chopsticks to eat the cooked radish cake from a plate. They look directly at the camera with expressive facial reactions, nodding and gesturing with their hands to indicate enjoyment. In the background, a shelf with various plush toys and home decorations is visible.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 你敢信 好市多竟然有賣. (2) [Subtitle]: 蘿蔔糕 他開始讓你. [Variety]: 自己炒蘿蔔糕啦. (3) [Variety]: 酷斃了 XO醬炒蘿蔔糕 一公斤239元. (4) [Variety]: 味道超爆炸 XO醬炒蘿蔔糕. (5) [Subtitle]: 然後他的蘿蔔糕跟手一樣大哎 然後還有炒蛋. (6) [Subtitle]: 請我們小廚娘 回去加熱看看. (7) [Subtitle]: 回家來試試看 好不好吃. (8) [Subtitle]: 麻不麻煩. (9) [Subtitle]: 把蘿蔔糕煎至上色. (10) [Subtitle]: 加入蔬菜拌炒. (11) [Subtitle]: 把XO醬炒香. (12) [Subtitle]: 上菜囉. (13) [Subtitle]: 炒蘿蔔糕 第一次吃到把韭菜 豆芽菜加XO醬下去炒. (14) [Subtitle]: 它那個炒出來那個股香氣 一加下去那個醬汁的時候 哦. (15) [Variety]: 鍋氣跟香氣. [Subtitle]: 整個那個 鍋氣跟香氣都一起撲上來. (16) [Subtitle]: 然後包括它的韭菜啊 豆芽菜都非常新鮮 非常的最. (17) [Subtitle]: 配上它的XO醬 它的XO醬我覺得是蠻特別. (18) [Subtitle]: 蠻厲害的XO醬 沒錯. (19) [Subtitle]: 然後它的炒蛋 可以吸飽那所有的醬汁 非常的高. (20) [Subtitle]: 然後蘿蔔糕整體 也是厚厚的 這樣一口一口搭. (21) [Subtitle]: 非常不錯 如果你很喜歡蘿蔔糕的話. (22) [Subtitle]: 可以買回家嘗試看看. (23) [Subtitle]: 但它蘿蔔糕比較軟 但是對於我牙齒不好的人 好喜歡哦 軟軟的.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female presenters, approximately 5 shoppers in the background at Costco, and 1 child passing by.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women; one has long dark hair and wears a black vest over white, the other wears a black beret and a white t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves from a commercial warehouse setting with high ceilings and industrial shelving to a modern domestic kitchen with a stovetop and then to a cozy living room with shelves of collectibles.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy pop beat and a bright female voice speaking rapidly with high enthusiasm. Background ambient noise of a busy retail space is faintly audible. A digital 'ding' sound effect occurs as the product is highlighted. (2) A transition is marked by a sudden, loud 'whoosh' sound effect and the sharp, high-frequency sound of cold food hitting hot oil in a pan. The sizzling sound is dominant and constant, indicating high heat. A male voice provides a clear, instructional narrative with a calm, professional tone over the continuing BGM. (3) The rhythmic clinking of metal tongs against a pan and the splash of liquid sauce pouring create a textured acoustic environment. This is followed by another 'whoosh' transition. (4) In the final segment, two female voices overlap in an excited conversation. They use expressive tonal shifts, including rising intonations of surprise and pleasure. The sound of chopsticks clicking on a ceramic plate and occasional soft chewing or crunching sounds are audible beneath the upbeat music, which maintains a consistent tempo throughout.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a new food product found at Costco, demonstrate its ease of preparation at home, and provide a positive review of its taste and texture to encourage viewers to purchase it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly highlights the Costco brand and specific Kirkland Signature product features, pricing, and taste benefits.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-energy, social-media native product review and tutorial that effectively uses fast-paced editing and bright visuals to maintain engagement.
